sections.content: Types: Ordinary (navy blue, 10yr adults/5yr minors), Official (white), Diplomatic (maroon). Fee: Rs 1,500 (36 pages), Rs 2,000 (60 pages). Tatkal: +Rs 2,000.

Need: (1) Address proof - Aadhaar/utility bill/bank statement/voter ID/rent agreement. (2) DOB proof - birth certificate (born after 1989)/SLC/Aadhaar. (3) Old passport (reissue). Annexes: E (orphans), F (no birth cert), H (name change after marriage), I (appearance change).

Steps: (1) Register passportindia.gov.in. (2) Fill application. (3) Pay online. (4) Book PSK/POPSK appointment. (5) Visit with originals. (6) Doc verification + biometrics. (7) Police verification 1-3 weeks. (8) Dispatched via Speed Post. Time: 7-21 days normal, 1-3 days tatkal.
Track at passportindia.gov.in or mPassport Seva app. Enter file number. Stages: Applied > Verified > PV Initiated > PV Completed > Granted > Printed > Dispatched. SMS alerts at each stage.
